title: G.E.N.E.S.I.S
fullTitle: Generative Engine for Networked, Embedded, Spatial Infrastructure Synthesis
abstract: A patented rule-aware generative system that automates urban layout planning from site boundaries into code-compliant city layouts with integrated multi-domain proxy simulations for traffic, drainage, and wind analysis.
claims: Automated boundary-to-layout generation with multi-candidate output
Regulation-by-design with fail-fast compliance engine enforcing NBC standards
Integrated traffic proxy simulation with graph-based routing and LOS metrics
D8 flow accumulation for drainage risk assessment
Gaussian wake model for wind/ventilation corridor scoring
KPI-based composite scoring (0-100) with Top-K layout ranking
